title: Front Office Manager - Oberoi Hotels - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Oberoi Hotels - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Oberoi Hotels! We are hiring a Front Office Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Oberoi Hotels:
Oberoi Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
